# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# Rule: date_of_birth
# Category: identity
# Jurisdiction: global
#
# Preserves the year and masks month and day in four common formats
# (ISO hyphen, slash-ISO YYYY/MM/DD, slash D-first DD/MM/YYYY,
# `Month D, YYYY`); does not satisfy HIPAA Safe Harbor on its own.
# Example: 1985-03-15 → 1985-**-**.

1985-03-15	1985-**-**

# Slash form mirrors the ISO branch — both fields' mask widths match
# the input. The previous implementation hardcoded the middle field to
# four mask runes regardless of input width; surfaced by the corpus
# harness in #54 and fixed in #80.
1/1/2000	*/*/2000
10/10/2000	**/**/2000
01/01/2000	**/**/2000
10/1/2000	**/*/2000
1/10/2000	*/**/2000

# Slash-ISO `YYYY/MM/DD` — recognised since #84. Year preserved,
# month and day width-matched to the input. Previously these
# inputs fell through to SameLengthMask.
2000/01/16	2000/**/**
2000/1/6	2000/*/*
1985/03/15	1985/**/**
1985/3/5	1985/*/*

# === generated (do not edit; regenerated by make corpus-regen) ===
#
# 345 generated fixtures for rule "date_of_birth".
# Inputs come from a deterministic per-rule strategy; expected
# outputs are mask.Apply at generation time.
#
